zh.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot於0992年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉讓安-達阿托。她和Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède至少有6個兒子。她去世於大約1060年在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利坦卡維爾享年69歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉馬-德-波黑維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Abbetot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abbott
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English abbod, abbot(t), abbat ‘abbot’ (Old English abbod) or Old French abet ‘priest’. Both the Old English and the Old French term are derived from Late Latin abbas (genitive abbatis) ‘priest’, from Greek abbas, from Aramaic aba ‘father’. The nickname was presumably a joking reference to a person's behaviour. In the US, the English name is also sometimes a translation of a cognate or equivalent European name, e.g. Italian Abate , Spanish Abad , or German Abt .

History: George Abbot from Yorkshire, England, settled in Andover, MA, in 1640; he had numerous prominent descendants. George Abbott (probably not the same man) died in Rowley, MA, in 1647. Another early migrant was James Abbott, who came from Somerset, England, to Long Island, NY, in the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot was born in 0992, in Saint-Jean-d'Abbetot, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France. She had at least 6 sons with Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède. She died about 1060, in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Saint-Martin-de-Boscherville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot est née en 0992, à Saint-Jean-d'Abbetot, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède. Elle est décédée environ 1060, à Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Martin-de-Boscherville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot wurde 0992 in Saint-Jean-d'Abbetot, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hatte mit Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb um 1060 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Martin-de-Boscherville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot è nata il nel 0992 nel Saint-Jean-d'Abbetot, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède. Morì circa 1060, nel Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Martin-de-Boscherville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetotは0992年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ジェアン-ド'アベトトで生まれた。彼女はGeraldus I de la Ville Tancrèdeとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1060年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメタンカーヴィルで69歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-マルティン-デ-ボシェルヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot(은)는 0992년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-j이-드'압베토트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1060년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 탠카빌에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-마틴-데-보슈르빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot nasceu em 0992, em Saint-Jean-d'Abbetot, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1060, em Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Martin-de-Boscherville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot родилась в 0992 г. в местности сеинт-джин-д'аббетот, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède. Она умерла около 1060 г. в местности танкарвилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-мартин-де-бощирвилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Helissende de Abbetot nació en 0992, en Saint-Jean-d'Abbetot, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède. Murió aproximadamente 1060, en Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Martin-de-Boscherville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
